title: Minimalist sound pack
description: Makes pvp related sounds much less noisy
body:
Experience PvP like never before with a clean, distraction-free audio overhaul designed for focus and precision. This pack transforms key combat sounds into soft, minimalist, ASMR-style effects that feel satisfying without being overwhelming.

Eating sounds are smoother and more subtle, helping you stay locked in during intense fights. Critical hits deliver crisp, refined feedback without harsh noise, while explosions are toned down into controlled, low-impact bursts that won’t destroy your ears mid-game.

Every sound is carefully balanced to reduce clutter and improve clarity, making it easier to react, track fights, and stay calm under pressure. Whether you're grinding duels or playing competitively, this pack keeps your audio clean, immersive, and satisfying.

Features:

Minimalist, ASMR-inspired sound design
Softer eating sounds for less distraction
Clean and satisfying critical hit feedback
Controlled, low-noise explosion effects
Perfect for competitive PvP and long sessions

Stay focused. Stay calm. Win more fights.
